scores.name: hardship_handling
scores.reason: The agent acknowledged the borrower's refusal but did not effectively handle the hardship expressed by the borrower.

scores.name: continuity
scores.reason: The conversation lacked continuity as the agent repeated the same requests without addressing the borrower's concerns.

scores.name: resolution_quality
scores.reason: The conversation did not move towards a resolution, as the borrower repeatedly rejected options without any alternative solutions being offered.
